intro: The clearest dividing line between Adapty and Maxio is access: Adapty offers a free tier you can start on, while Maxio requires a paid plan from day one (subscription from $100). If you need to prototype before committing budget, that matters. Beyond the headline, Adapty carries medium lock-in (subscription sdk wraps app store/play; purchase data exportable) and subscription from $0/mo, with a free tier; Maxio carries medium lock-in (billing data exportable) and subscription from $100. Adapty is a fit when you are saas. Maxio is a fit when you are saas. The honest trade-off: Adapty is explicitly not for simple projects; Maxio is explicitly not for simple projects. On the product side, Adapty is described as In-app subscription SDK for iOS and Android with paywall A/B testing, revenue analytics, and purchase validation, and Maxio is described as Subscription and revenue management platform for B2B SaaS combining billing, revenue recognition, and financial metrics.
quick_take: Adapty is for saas; Maxio is for saas; decide on whether you need a free tier.
verdict_a: Choose Adapty if you need a free tier to start before committing budget, and your use case matches saas.
verdict_b: Choose Maxio if you are saas and comfortable with its subscription from $100.

faq.a: Adapty starts at $0/mo; Maxio starts at $100. On entry price alone that is the comparison, but real cost scales with users, events or volume, which the entry prices do not capture. Check each vendor's full tier list before committing.

faq.q: Can I migrate from Adapty to Maxio?
faq.a: Migration from Adapty to Maxio is feasible but not trivial: Adapty has medium lock-in (subscription sdk wraps app store/play; purchase data exportable). Core data can move; integrations and workflow logic need rebuild. Allow for a parallel-run period.

Both tools tie at 4/5 for developer experience on our scoring. The real difference will show up in your specific workflow, not the headline rating. A one-hour spike on both is the fastest way to decide.

faq.q: Is Maxio a good alternative to Adapty?
faq.a: Maxio targets the same best-fit audience as Adapty (saas). Note that Maxio is explicitly not for simple projects, so it only replaces Adapty if you are outside that exclusion. Feature-for-feature parity is not guaranteed, so confirm the specific capability you rely on before switching.
